content.title: High-Speed and Secure Solution for Your Online Success
content.description: Deploy your website on ultra-fast NVMe storage with enterprise-grade security and 24/7 server monitoring.

items.title: Reseller Hosting
items.description: A reliable hosting solution to publish and manage your website online with ease.

items.title: WordPress Hosting
items.description: Optimized hosting designed for fast, secure, and high-performance WordPress websites.

items.title: Cloud Hosting
items.description: Scalable hosting powered by multiple servers for maximum uptime, flexibility, and speed.

items.title: Shared Hosting
items.description: An affordable hosting option where multiple websites share server resources.

items.title: Dedicated Hosting
items.description: A powerful hosting setup that gives you full control of an entire server for maximum performance.

items.title: VPS Hosting
items.description: High-performance virtual private servers with full root access and scalability.

pricing.title: Web Hosting Plans That Fit Your Budget
pricing.description: Experience ultra-fast loading speeds globally for seamless performance and reliability anywhere in the world.

pricingThree.title: Host Package
pricingThree.description: Whether you're looking to create a website, blog or online store, NameCadre can get you started with a hosting plan tailored to your specific needs.

features.label: Unlimited Website
features.info: You can build Unlimited websites under this super package

features.label: 100 GB SSD Storage
features.info: Our servers have high-performance NVMe Solid State Drives (SSD) for files and databases, so your sites load incredibly fast. Storage is per plan, so if you have multiple sites, your storage is shared across them.

features.label: Free Migration
features.info: You purchased hosting from NameCadre, but your website is hosted by another company.  We will migrate your website from that company to our company for free.

features.label: Free Email
features.info: You can use 190 email addresses under this Ultra package.  And can receive and send emails up to 100 GB.

features.label: Free .Com (US$ 11 value)
features.info: Register a domain for free for one year when purchasing a yearly (or longer) hosting plan. Additional terms apply, as not all TLDs are eligible for this promotion. Free domain must be registered within 12 months of acquiring the hosting plan, or it will be cancelled.

features.label: 3 Website
features.info: You can build 3 websites under this single package

features.title: Launch Your Website with Confidence
features.description: Build, launch, and grow your digital presence with fast, secure, and reliable hosting solutions.

itemOne.title: Find & Pick Your Ideal Domain
itemOne.description: Choose from thousands of available domains to kickstart your brand's digital journey.

itemTwo.title: Pick a Hosting Plan That Works for You
itemTwo.description: Powerful, flexible, and reliable hosting designed to support your business growth. Match your business requirements with the right hosting performance.

itemThree.title: Blazing-Fast Loading Website, Speeds Worldwide.
itemThree.description: Deliver a seamless browsing experience with ultra-fast page loading and performance optimized for every corner of the globe.

list.title: Optimized Server Performance:
list.description: High-performance infrastructure ensures rapid load times even during traffic spikes.

list.title: Advanced Caching Technology:
list.description: Smart caching accelerates your pages for instant access.

list.title: Lightning-Fast Response Times:
list.description: Minimize latency and provide a smooth user experience across all devices.

choose.title: Why You Should Choose Us
choose.description: Experience unmatched performance, reliability, and support designed to elevate your online presence.

supportFramework.title: NameCadre Support This Frontend Framework
supportFramework.description: NameCadre works with all frontend frameworks...

joinCommunity.title: Need Help For Deciding or Looking Help For Technical Issue?
joinCommunity.description: Talk to one of our hosting specialist who will review your needs and propose a tailored hosting solution that will match your specific business reality and needs.

cpanelFeatures.title: User Friendly Control Panel
cpanelFeatures.description: Experience total control with our high-performance control panel. Featuring LiteSpeed integration and NVMe-optimized management tools, we make website administration faster and easier than ever

items.title: One-Click Deploy
items.description: Instantly install WordPress, Joomla, or E-commerce apps with a single click.

items.title: Easy Management
items.description: Manage domains, professional emails, and files effortlessly through cPanel.

items.title: Terminal Access
items.description: Direct command-line access within your browser for advanced server control.

items.title: Free SSL Security
items.description: Keep your data safe and improve SEO with automated, free SSL certificates.

items.title: Automated Backups
items.description: Never lose data with our routine off-site backups and easy one-click restore.

items.title: LiteSpeed Speed
items.description: Experience 20x faster page loading with LiteSpeed web server technology.
